# CTFontOrientation.vertical

**Case**

The vertical orientation.

## Declaration

```swift
case vertical
```

## Font Orientations

- **CTFontOrientation.default**: The native orientation of the font.
- **CTFontOrientation.horizontal**: The horizontal orientation.
